description: Golden memory set for recall@k + helpfulness eval. Each memory has a deterministic bag-of-words embedding (computed by the runner from `content`). For every query a STALE, low-importance DISTRACTOR is engineered to have a HIGHER pure-cosine similarity than the truly-needed memory (it matches the query words more tightly), and the distractor is listed first so a stable cosine sort ranks it on top. The composite score (relevance + importance + recency) is what recovers the memory the user actually needs. recall@1 therefore directly measures the re-rank improvement. `access_count` is the ACT-R (B4) retrieval-frequency input: durable current facts are retrieved often, stale one-off distractors rarely. The extra sections (frequency/extraction/mmr/linking) drive the B4/B5/B6/B7 eval extensions with their own isolated vocabularies so the primary cosine-vs-composite guard is untouched.

memories.note: distractor: exact query phrasing -> highest cosine, but stale + trivial

memories.content: user favorite color is teal as of this week

memories.note: distractor: exact phrasing of an outdated mention

memories.content: user peanut allergy is now severe carry epipen

memories.note: distractor: bare phrasing, no current value

memories.content: user lives city berlin since last month
project apollo deadline is this friday must ship
user dog named biscuit a golden retriever

queries.why: stale exact-match distractor wins on cosine; composite recovers the current value
stale distractor wins on cosine; the severe current fact must surface
stale distractor wins on cosine; the current city must surface
stale distractor wins on cosine; the actionable current deadline must surface
stale distractor wins on cosine; the current pet fact must surface

frequency_memories.content: database migration status is pending review
frequency_memories.note: B4: listed FIRST so a cosine tie keeps it on top; retrieved only once

frequency_memories.content: database migration status is pending review
frequency_memories.note: B4: identical content+recency+importance, retrieved 90x -> ACT-R must promote it

frequency_queries.why: recency + importance + cosine are all TIED; only retrieval frequency differs, so a high-frequency target must overtake a rarely-used one under power_actr

extraction_items.source: user favorite color is teal. user has a severe peanut allergy so must carry an epipen. user lives in berlin germany. user works as a data engineer.
facts: user has a severe peanut allergy so must carry an epipen
user works as a data engineer

mmr_memories.content: python performance tip use a cache
python performance tip use a cache
python performance tip use a cache
python performance tip run the profiler tool

mmr_queries.why: three IDENTICAL caching tips crowd the top; at top_k=2 pure cosine returns two redundant caches, MMR spends the budget to also surface the complementary profiling tip

linked_memories.content: project apollo is led by alice
alice can be reached at alice at corp dot com
the weather today is sunny and warm

link_queries.why: the contact fact is reachable only THROUGH the apollo->contact link; single-shot cosine on the query never surfaces it
